name: Derivative field
description: Allows users to specify source field (or multiple fields or infinitely repeating instrument fields), a target field and a prompt. A clickable button will appear with a target field on a form/survey where the prompt results operating on source field(s) and deposits results in target field.

project-settings.name:
Source Field
REDCap input fields to utilize as a part of a prompt

Target Field
REDCap input fields to utilize as a part of a prompt
